normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem bfs_shortest_path_length_eq (adj : Array (Array Nat)) (source : Nat) : (let dist := bfs_shortest_path adj source; dist.length = adj.size) := by
 simp [bfs_shortest_path]
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The returned distance vector has length exactly equal to the number of vertices.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem bfs_shortest_path_source_anchor (adj : Array (Array Nat)) (source : Nat) (h : source < adj.size) :
 (bfs_shortest_path adj source)[source] = some 0 := by
 simp [bfs_shortest_path, h]
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The source distance is anchored to Some(0) when the source index is in bounds.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem bfs_shortest_path_reachability_witness (adj : Array (Array Nat)) (source : Nat) (h : source < adj.size)
  (v : Nat) (k : Nat) (hk : (bfs_shortest_path adj source)[v] = some k) :
  âˆƒ p : List Nat,
   p.length = k + 1 âˆ§ p.get? 0 = some source âˆ§ p.get? k = some v âˆ§
   (âˆ€ i : Nat, i + 1 < p.length â†’
     let u := p.get! i
     let w := p.get! (i + 1)
     w âˆˆ adj[u].toList) := by
 -- proof obligation: extract the BFS predecessor chain and show each consecutive vertex pair is an edge
 admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: If dist[v] = Some(k), there exists a directed path from source to v using exactly k edges (k+1 vertices).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem bfs_shortest_path_minimality (adj : Array (Array Nat)) (source : Nat) (h : source < adj.size)
  (v : Nat) (k : Nat) (hk : (bfs_shortest_path adj source)[v] = some k) :
  Â¬ (âˆƒ m : Nat, âˆƒ p : List Nat,
      p.length = m + 1 âˆ§ p.get? 0 = some source âˆ§ p.get? m = some v âˆ§
      (âˆ€ i : Nat, i + 1 < p.length â†’
        let u := p.get! i
        let w := p.get! (i + 1)
        w âˆˆ adj[u].toList) âˆ§ m < k) := by
 -- proof obligation: show no path with fewer than k edges exists
 admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Minimality: if dist[v] = Some(k), then there is no directed path from source to v using fewer than k edges.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem bfs_shortest_path_unreachability_iff (adj : Array (Array Nat)) (source : Nat) (h : source < adj.size)
  (v : Nat) :
  (bfs_shortest_path adj source)[v] = none â†”
   Â¬ (âˆƒ k : Nat, âˆƒ p : List Nat,
       p.length = k + 1 âˆ§ p.get? 0 = some source âˆ§ p.get? k = some v âˆ§
       (âˆ€ i : Nat, i + 1 < p.length â†’
         let u := p.get! i
         let w := p.get! (i + 1)
         w âˆˆ adj[u].toList)) := by
 -- proof obligation: BFS explores all reachable vertices and assigns their shortest edge counts
 admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Unreachability: dist[v] = None iff there is no directed path from source to v.
